changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.sql: -- Weekly clock assignment grid: station-level defaults mapping ISO day-of-week -- (1=Monday..7=Sunday) + a station-local minute window to a clock template. -- New schedule days seed their per-day clock schedule from this grid; the per-day -- rows remain the override mechanism. CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS station_clock_grid ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, station_id UUID NOT NULL, day_of_week INTEGER NOT NULL, position INTEGER NOT NULL, local_start_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL, local_end_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL, clock_template_id UUID NOT NULL ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_station_clock_grid_station ON station_clock_grid(station_id, day_of_week);
